shakshi: The Fae intel mission from 0014 closed — the player reported back to Bombastus at Castle Azoth
Lucion met — priest of Jabiru, God of language, stories and knowledge. Luminyx's teacher. The right teacher for the most narratively load-bearing mortal in the series.
Luminyx met — Hildegarde's daughter, mortal, not yet a spirit. The hinge point of the loop Drovitth watches from the Orrery.
The family and teaching triangle visible — Hildegarde's daughter, Lucion's student, both entangled with what the king is making war on
Kelly managed the information before it reached Bombastus — the same truth distorted differently depending on what the player built
Nexiott line outcome — clouded intelligence produced a heresy verdict. Hypatia is officially condemned.
Fae/Assassin line outcome — clean intelligence produced a pardon. Hypatia is officially cleared.
Bombastus got the information in the form Kelly allowed — his understanding of Hypatia permanently shaped by which line the player walked
Lucion has been Luminyx's teacher — relevant to every subsequent encounter with either of them
The queen's opposition to the war has roots deeper than politics — her daughter is entangled with the Fae, her trusted figure teaches the loop's hinge point
